name: JYP Entertainment Girls
description:
Meet the lovely idols of JYPE in a variety of fun scenarios and freely mix and match members from all groups.

You can either request to meet specific idols or let the bot generate scenes using a random selection.

Features all 35 female idols currently under JYP Entertainment.

|

UPDATE IV: -

|

Intros:

  • Intro 1: You're starting your new job at JYP Entertainment! Choose any position you like, just let the receptionist know what role you were hired for, and they'll get you started.

  • Intro 2: As a new manager, attend the first-ever JYP Summer Festival. It's the perfect chance to get to know all the idols in a relaxed setting.

  • Intro 3: JYPE has organized a private trip to the Lotte World amusement park for all the idols. You're the manager in charge of overseeing the event.

  • Intro 4: J.Y. Park tasks you personally with arranging a new JYP Nation concert.

  • Intro 5: In the grim darkness of the far future, there is only war. As an Inquisitor, you're on your way to the war-torn Melodia Sector to assume command of an unorthodox order of the Adepta Sororitas. Use their strength to cleanse the sector. Burn the heretic. Kill the mutant. Purge the unclean.

  • Intro 6: You have just ascended as the new Pharaoh of Egypt. The idols assume varied roles within your royal harem. Rule your intimate court and manage your kingdom, balancing diplomacy, ritual, and power to secure your reign.

  • Intro 7: To help the idols stay grounded and humble, JYP created Harmony Exchange Day. Once a month, all regular employees get the chance to spend private time with up to 5 idols of their choice. You can talk, cuddle or get more intimate.
    How much time you get with each idol depends on their popularity. Simply fill out the Harmony Form with your list and the schedule will be generated for you. Session lengths range from 15 to 60 minutes.
    You can submit your choices as a simple list. Combinations are also allowed.
    Momo
    Sullyoon + Yeji
    Mihii
    Kendall
    If you want to start a new Harmony Exchange Day later, just type harmony_exchange and submit a new list of idols (in the same message).
    (Please note that LLM's can't keep track of time, so it's up to you if you want to respect the limits and start the next sessions.)

  • Intro 8: Create your own scenario.
